summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Syroce CRM - Turkish hotel website template generator. Backend API and frontend UI both working correctly with all major features functional.
passed_tests: Backend API: Dashboard stats (30 templates seeded correctly)
Backend API: Templates CRUD operations (30 templates with categories)
Backend API: Clients CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, search)
Backend API: Projects CRUD operations (create, update, export ZIP)
Backend API: Activity logging system
Frontend: Dashboard loads with correct stats display
Frontend: Template Gallery shows 30 templates
Frontend: Template Gallery category filtering (luxury, boutique, resort, etc.)
Frontend: Template Gallery search functionality
Frontend: Template preview dialog opens correctly
Frontend: Project creation from template works
Frontend: Template Editor loads with split layout (sections + preview)
Frontend: Editor section editing (hero, theme customization)
Frontend: Editor device preview modes (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Frontend: Editor save and export functionality
Frontend: Clients page - add, edit, search clients
Frontend: Projects page - status filtering, search, export
Frontend: Sidebar navigation between all pages works
Frontend: Turkish language interface throughout
Frontend: Dark theme UI implementation

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor DOM element attachment issue during template preview)
